## Summary

Describe the problem and the approach taken.

## Validation

List the commands, platforms, and scenarios used to verify the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated generated files.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when the user-facing contract changed.
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes locally, or any skipped checks are explained above.
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`, `uv run ruff format --check .`, and `uv run mypy src` pass.
- [ ] Logs, fixtures, and screenshots contain no credentials, private URLs, personal paths, or user data.
- [ ] I have read and agree to follow the Code of Conduct.
